full_text:
Fu Qian 傅僉
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Fu Qian (傅僉). Fu Tong’s son, served Shu. Captured Li Peng and Wang Zhen. Died in battle. Fu Qian was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom. Fu Qian lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
